SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF IVAN GRADDY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HELEN ESPINOSA. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRADDY, IVAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WHOLE FOODS MARKET STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
